description: Connects GR domain (gravitational potentials from PHYS-42) to GUT domain (beta coefficients from unification) through the sector splitting formula. The beta coefficients that predict sin2_tW and alpha_s also predict the clock splitting epsilon.
thesis: The depth component D (reading) and tick component K (clock) are separable. The sector splitting epsilon = kappa x |Delta_beta| x Delta_Phi/c^2 connects gauge integers to gravitational potentials.
formula: epsilon_sector = kappa x |beta_i - beta_j| x Delta_Phi/c^2
